overview: This specimen appears to be a Thinlip conger (Gnathophis mystax), a species of conger eel. It is characterized by its long, slender body, reaching a maximum length of about 60 centimeters. They typically inhabit deep waters (75–800 meters) over mud and sand bottoms but may wash ashore. Wikipedia +1 2 sites Gnathophis mystax - Wikipedia Gnathophis mystax - Wikipedia. Gnathophis mystax.
